title: Brightmark RNG Holdings Achieves Landmark First Gas Milestone at 10 Midwest RNG Projects
content: Brightmark RNG Holdings LLC has delivered first gas at 10 renewable natural gas (RNG) projects across the Midwest. Brightmark RNG Holdings LLC is a joint venture between Chevron U.S.A. Inc., a subsidiary of Chevron Corporation, and Brightmark Fund Holdings LLC, a subsidiary of Brightmark LLC. The Brightmark RNG Holdings LLC joint venture now owns and operates 15 RNG projects in the Midwest.
author: Analysts Account
